statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.notes: Calculate binomial coefficient without using built-in functions

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int combine(int n, int k) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result *= n - (k - i); } return result; } };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public int combine(int n, int k) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result *= n - (k - i); } return result; } }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def combine(self, n, k): result = 1 for i in range(1, k+1): result *= n - (k - i) return result
starterCode.javascript: var combine = function(n, k) { var result = 1; for (var i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result *= n - (k - i); } return result; };

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int combine(int n, int k) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result = result * (n - (k - i)) / (k - i); } return result; } }
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public int combine(int n, int k) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result = result * (n - (k - i)) / (k - i); } return result; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def combine(self, n, k): result = 1 for i in range(1, k+1): result = result * (n - (k - i)) / (k - i) return result
buggyStarterCode.javascript: var combine = function(n, k) { var result = 1; for (var i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result = result * (n - (k - i)) / (k - i); } return result; };

functionSignature.python: def combine(self, n: int, k: int) -> int:

solutions.python:
class Solution: def combine(self, n, k): result = 1 for i in range(1, k+1): result *= n - (k - i) return result
print(Solution().combine(5, 2))
solutions.cpp:
// This is a C++ solution that reads from std::cin, calls Solution::combine, and prints output to std::cout.
class Solution { public: int combine(int n, int k) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result *= n - (k - i); } return result; } }; int main() { Solution solution; int n, k; cin >> n >> k; cout << solution.combine(n, k) << endl; return 0; }
